economic_notes: Penelakut Seafood Ltd. and Spune'lexutth' Holdings Inc. are government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis. Both reported losses in the period. COVID-19 additional ISC funding of $309,020 received.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Two GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Penelakut Seafood Ltd. and Spune'lexutth' Holdings Inc., both reporting losses. No schedule of remuneration included in financial statements. Annual debt service figure represents net increase in loans payable per cash flow statement; actual principal repayments not separately disclosed. Expenses_salaries_total calculated from Note 11 wages ($4,414,709) plus benefits ($636,847). Community Operations used for expenses_infrastructure. Total government transfers includes ISC ($11,345,519) + Health Authority ($2,431,622) + CSETS ($346,475) + Province of BC ($1,854,014) + FNESC ($1,487,572) = $17,465,202; minor rounding difference noted.
